title: Quantitative Imaging and Characterization of Ganglioside Diversity in Mouse and Human Brain Tissues
author: Mutuku, Shadrack
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study developed a novel quantitative mass spectrometry imaging (Q-MSI) method for ganglioides. This was applied to study ganglisoside composition and diversity within both mosue brain tissues as well as human frontal cortex and midbrain tissues. Here the mass spectrometry imaging data (.imzML) format are provided. Further detials can be found in the corresponding pre-print ( doi:  https://doi.org/10.64898/2026.05.20.726404).  For the human tissue file names: FC = Frontal Cortex, MB = Midbrain
steps_raw: This study developed a novel quantitative mass spectrometry imaging (Q-MSI) method for ganglioides.
